    return minver
  }

  minver = new SemVer('0.0.0-0')
  if (range.test(minver)) {

  }

  minver = null

    const comparators = range.set[i]

    let setMin = null

            compver.patch++

          break

        /* istanbul ignore next */
        default:

      }

    if (setMin && (!minver || gt(minver, setMin))) {
      minver = setMin
    }
  }

  if (minver && range.test(minver)) {
    return minver
  }

  return null
}
